{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Copywriter",
  "description": "Etu Odi Communications is a full service creative agency, combining insightful brand strategy, creative communication and engaging experience in helping organisations chart the course from awareness to loyalty in the minds and hearts of its customers. We aim to help clients release the potential of their brands by making sure that their benefits are clearly defined and effectively communicated through powerful ideas around which communities of like minded passionistas can converge and interact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Copywriter

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Responsibilities


	Meet with the Business Manager to discuss the client&rsquo;s requirements, core messages, and target. Audience
	Brainstorm ideas and concepts for the visual and words with other members of the creative team
	Write various copy Options, which may be presented to the client as a storyboard
	Conduct research on the product, target audience, and competitor activities in the market.
	Present ideas to the creative director, some of which may be rejected or developed into a workable concept.
	Develop creative ideas and concepts, often in partnership with the art director.
	Liaise with clients and interpret their briefs
	Proofread copy to check spelling and grammar.
	Oversee campaigns and bookings and liaise with designers, illustrators, printers, photographers, and production companies.
	Amend, revise, and redevelop ads or campaigns in response to feedback from the creative director, account management team, or clients.
	Review progress and modify copy until the client is satisfied
	Work on several campaigns at once, sometimes under pressure and often with tight deadlines.
	Monitor the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;jobs@etuodi.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Copywriter Job at Etu Odi Communications




        
    

        
        Etu Odi Communications is a full service creative agency, combining insightful brand strategy, creative communication and engaging experience in helping organisations chart the course from awareness to loyalty in the minds and hearts of its customers. We aim to help clients release the potential of their brands by making sure that their benefits are clearly defined and effectively communicated through powerful ideas around which communities of like minded passionistas can converge and interact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Copywriter

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Meet with the Business Manager to discuss the client’s requirements, core messages, and target. Audience
	Brainstorm ideas and concepts for the visual and words with other members of the creative team
	Write various copy Options, which may be presented to the client as a storyboard
	Conduct research on the product, target audience, and competitor activities in the market.
	Present ideas to the creative director, some of which may be rejected or developed into a workable concept.
	Develop creative ideas and concepts, often in partnership with the art director.
	Liaise with clients and interpret their briefs
	Proofread copy to check spelling and grammar.
	Oversee campaigns and bookings and liaise with designers, illustrators, printers, photographers, and production companies.
	Amend, revise, and redevelop ads or campaigns in response to feedback from the creative director, account management team, or clients.
	Review progress and modify copy until the client is satisfied
	Work on several campaigns at once, sometimes under pressure and often with tight deadlines.
	Monitor the effectiveness of advertising campaigns.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jobs@etuodi.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Executive",
  "description": "Smart Partners Consulting Limited&nbsp;(SPCL) is an indigenous consulting firm poised on the business model of collaboration to provide professional services of Human Resources and Business Strategy to different companies in various sectors of Nigeria&rsquo;s economy. It was incorporated in July 2013. Our idea of collaboration and partnership involves the synergy of tested experts in the market place to research, identify and proffer solutions to the ever dynamic needs of our Clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department:&nbsp;Marketing / Creative

Job Summary


	The Social Media Executive is responsible for planning, creating, and managing content across social media platforms to drive brand awareness, engagement, and lead generation.
	The role includes content development, community management, campaign support, and performance reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies aligned with business goals
	Create and schedule engaging content across platforms
	Manage comments, messages, and online community engagement
	Support paid social campaigns and coordinate ad creatives
	Track performance metrics and prepare regular reports
	Monitor trends and recommend content improvements.


Key Performance Areas


	Engagement and follower growth
	Content quality and consistency
	Campaign performance
	Contribution to lead generation and brand visibility.


Requirements


	3&ndash;4 years of experience in social media or digital marketing
	Proficiency in social media platforms and analytics tools
	Basic design and content creation skills (Canva/Adobe &ndash; an advantage)
	Strong communication, creativity, and time management skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;talent@smartpartnersng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Social Media Executive Job at Smart Partners Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Smart Partners Consulting Limited (SPCL) is an indigenous consulting firm poised on the business model of collaboration to provide professional services of Human Resources and Business Strategy to different companies in various sectors of Nigeria’s economy. It was incorporated in July 2013. Our idea of collaboration and partnership involves the synergy of tested experts in the market place to research, identify and proffer solutions to the ever dynamic needs of our Clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Executive
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Department: Marketing / Creative

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Social Media Executive is responsible for planning, creating, and managing content across social media platforms to drive brand awareness, engagement, and lead generation.
	The role includes content development, community management, campaign support, and performance reporting.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies aligned with business goals
	Create and schedule engaging content across platforms
	Manage comments, messages, and online community engagement
	Support paid social campaigns and coordinate ad creatives
	Track performance metrics and prepare regular reports
	Monitor trends and recommend content improvements.


Key Performance Areas


	Engagement and follower growth
	Content quality and consistency
	Campaign performance
	Contribution to lead generation and brand visibility.


Requirements


	3–4 years of experience in social media or digital marketing
	Proficiency in social media platforms and analytics tools
	Basic design and content creation skills (Canva/Adobe – an advantage)
	Strong communication, creativity, and time management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: talent@smartpartnersng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Factory Manager",
  "description": "Bolin Mining Company Limited is an integrated mining company headquartered in Abuja, Nigeria, with operational presence in some states of the country. The company is actively involved in mineral exploration, mining, processing, and production, delivering high-quality mineral resources to meet local and international industry demands. Leveraging modern technology, industry best practices, and a skilled workforce, Bolin Mining maintains efficient, safe, and environmentally responsible operations across its value chain.

Driven by a commitment to excellence, innovation, and sustainability, Bolin Mining contributes to the growth of Nigeria&rsquo;s solid minerals sector through responsible resource development, job creation, and strategic partnerships. Our mission is to remain a trusted industry leader by consistently delivering quality products, maintaining high operational standards, and fostering long-term value for stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Factory Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Itobe, Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description / Responsibilities


	Oversee daily factory operations to ensure efficiency, productivity, and safety.
	Plan, coordinate, and supervise production processes and staff.
	Implement quality control systems and operational standards.
	Monitor equipment performance and maintenance schedules.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
	Prepare operational reports and performance analyses.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Industrial Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience managing industrial or processing plant operations.
	Strong leadership, planning, and problem-solving skills.
	Knowledge of mineral processing operations is an advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and cover letter to:&nbsp;bolinmining@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

    }
  }
}



Factory Manager Job at Bolin Mining Company Limited




        
    

        
        Bolin Mining Company Limited is an integrated mining company headquartered in Abuja, Nigeria, with operational presence in some states of the country. The company is actively involved in mineral exploration, mining, processing, and production, delivering high-quality mineral resources to meet local and international industry demands. Leveraging modern technology, industry best practices, and a skilled workforce, Bolin Mining maintains efficient, safe, and environmentally responsible operations across its value chain.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Driven by a commitment to excellence, innovation, and sustainability, Bolin Mining contributes to the growth of Nigeria’s solid minerals sector through responsible resource development, job creation, and strategic partnerships. Our mission is to remain a trusted industry leader by consistently delivering quality products, maintaining high operational standards, and fostering long-term value for stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Factory Manager
Job Location: Itobe, Kogi
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description / Responsibilities


	Oversee daily factory operations to ensure efficiency, productivity, and safety.
	Plan, coordinate, and supervise production processes and staff.
	Implement quality control systems and operational standards.
	Monitor equipment performance and maintenance schedules.
	Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
	Prepare operational reports and performance analyses.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Industrial Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience managing industrial or processing plant operations.
	Strong leadership, planning, and problem-solving skills.
	Knowledge of mineral processing operations is an advantage.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs and cover letter to: bolinmining@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales Representative Job at Buena Sante Confectionaries




        
    

        
        Buena Sante Confectionaries is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative
Job Location: Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Part-time

Description


	We're looking for an experienced Sales Representative to join our team at Buena Sante supermarket!


Requirements


	1 - 3 years sales rep experience
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
N80,000 - N100,000 / month + Bonus
